note: Curve CryptoSwap-NG (V2 tricrypto) mainnet pools. 1 shared impl ABI -> 5 pool addresses (factory multi-address). 13 cover (exchange/add/remove/one_coin + useEth/receiver variants) + 15 exclude (3 exchange_underlying/extended deferred, 6 erc20 LP, 6 admin). Base tricrypto-base deferred to Base phase.

0x5b41b908.name: exchange(uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256)
0x5b41b908.reason: user exchange on CurveV2 cryptoswap — coin-index value-map (swap/one_coin) or baked coins (add/remove); recipient = receiver arg if present else tx.from.

0x394747c5.name: exchange(uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256,bool)

0x65b2489b.name: exchange_underlying(uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256)
0x65b2489b.reason: deferred: exchange_underlying ETH-unwraps the WETH coin slot (per-pool ETH/WETH index disambiguation needed to avoid mis-decode); exchange_extended is an integrator callback swap. The wrapped-coin swap intent is covered by exchange. NOT a permission grant.

0x23b872dd.name: transferFrom(address,address,uint256)
